prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, cross detail.

Scene: Avilia sits beside an AI assistant console that rapidly assembles a Python quant system scaffold from blocks labeled "数据", "回测", "买点", "可视化", "大模型". Avilia points at a simple sketch of the desired logic, and the blocks snap into a clean rough framework.

Core meaning: with a clear framework and logic in mind, AI can implement a surprising amount of code quickly.

Style: Chinese technical blog illustration, hand-drawn, clean white background, black/red/white palette, tiny blue AI glow. Minimal handwritten labels: "需求", "框架", "一口气搭起来".

Avoid dense architecture diagrams, avoid realistic IDE screenshots, avoid too much text.
